nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application entry point exposing the full REST API for the Modified ELO college football ranking system, with endpoints for teams, games, predictions, rankings, seasons, stats, and admin operations including live CFBD data import.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses FastAPI decorators for routing; admin endpoints are protected by an X-Admin-Key header matched against ADMIN_SECRET env var; background tasks are managed via FastAPI BackgroundTasks.

nodes.name: startup_event
nodes.summary: FastAPI startup event handler that initializes the database by calling init_db() to create all tables on application launch.

nodes.name: get_team
nodes.summary: Retrieves a single team by ID with season-specific ELO rating, wins/losses, rank, and SOS pulled from the active season's ranking history via RankingService.

nodes.name: update_team
nodes.summary: Updates team fields and automatically recalculates the preseason ELO rating via RankingService when any recruiting, transfer portal, or returning production field changes.

nodes.name: get_team_schedule
nodes.summary: Returns a team's full season schedule ordered by week/date, enriched with opponent details, scores, FCS flags, and postseason game metadata.

nodes.name: get_team_players
nodes.summary: Returns a paginated, filtered list of players for a team sorted by recruiting rating, supporting optional filters for recruiting year and position.

nodes.name: get_team_position_strength
nodes.summary: Calculates position group strength scores and overall position bonus for a team using player recruiting data and weights from position_weights.json.

nodes.name: get_team_games
nodes.summary: Returns a team's processed game log enriched with ELO before/after deltas for each game, used for team game-log display.

nodes.name: get_matchup
nodes.summary: Head-to-head comparison endpoint returning both teams' ELO histories, historical matchup records, and win probabilities for neutral, home-A, and home-B scenarios.

nodes.name: get_games
nodes.summary: Returns a paginated, multi-filter list of games sorted by week/date descending, supporting filters for season, week, team, and processing status.

nodes.name: create_game
nodes.summary: Creates a game record and immediately processes it through RankingService.process_game to update both teams' ELO ratings.

nodes.name: get_predictions
nodes.summary: Returns stored predictions for unprocessed games when available, falling back to on-the-fly generation via generate_predictions; supports week, team, and season filters.

nodes.name: get_historical_predictions
nodes.summary: Simulates predictions for a completed historical week by looking up teams' ELO ratings from ranking_history at game time and comparing against actual results for backtesting.

nodes.name: get_stored_predictions
nodes.summary: Returns stored prediction records enriched with game details and evaluation status, supporting filters for season, week, team, and evaluated-only.

nodes.name: get_prediction_comparison
nodes.summary: Compares ELO vs AP Poll prediction accuracy for a season by delegating to ap_poll_service.calculate_comparison_stats, returning a graceful empty state on failure.

nodes.name: get_rankings
nodes.summary: Returns current ELO rankings for a season enriched with rank change from the prior week, last 8 weeks of ELO history, and ESPN team IDs — all batch-queried for efficiency.

nodes.name: recalculate_rankings
nodes.summary: Resets all team ratings to preseason values, marks all season games as unprocessed, then reprocesses them in order to rebuild rankings from scratch.

nodes.name: run_weekly_update_task
nodes.summary: Background task that executes the weekly_update.py script in a subprocess, tracking status in the UpdateTask table with 30-minute timeout and error handling.

nodes.name: trigger_manual_update
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint that runs pre-flight checks (active season, current week detection, API usage threshold) before spawning a background weekly update task.

nodes.name: trigger_import
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint that runs the full CFBD import pipeline in-process: fetches games, upserts records, processes unprocessed games through ELO, saves weekly snapshots, and writes an import log.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package initializer for the models module, containing only a docstring that describes the module's contents (SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, and database configuration).

nodes.name: schemas.py
nodes.summary: Defines all Pydantic request/response schemas for the FastAPI application, covering teams, games, rankings, predictions, AP poll comparison, preseason simulation, admin operations, and import pipeline.
nodes.languageNotes: All schemas use Pydantic v2 (model_dump, from_attributes). ORM-compatible schemas include Config.from_attributes = True for SQLAlchemy model serialization.

nodes.name: TeamBase
nodes.summary: Base Pydantic schema for team data including conference, recruiting rank, transfer portal metrics, and returning production; serves as foundation for TeamCreate and TeamUpdate.

nodes.name: Team
nodes.summary: ORM-compatible team response schema extending TeamBase with ELO rating, win/loss record, timestamps, and ESPN team ID.

nodes.name: RankingEntry
nodes.summary: Schema for a single ranking entry including ELO rating, record, SOS, transfer portal rank, rank change from prior week, and last 8 ELO values for sparkline display.

nodes.name: GamePrediction
nodes.summary: Schema for game prediction responses including win probabilities, predicted scores, confidence level, and team ELO ratings at prediction time.

nodes.name: HistoricalPrediction
nodes.summary: Schema for a simulated historical prediction showing both teams' ELO at game time, predicted and actual results, and whether the prediction was correct.

nodes.name: ComparisonStats
nodes.summary: Comprehensive schema for ELO vs AP Poll prediction comparison including overall and per-week accuracy, disagreement details, and separate regular season / postseason breakdowns.

nodes.name: PreseasonComponent
nodes.summary: Schema exposing individual preseason rating bonus components (recruiting, transfer, returning production, position strength, previous season ELO) per team for client-side simulator recalculation.

nodes.name: StoredPrediction
nodes.summary: ORM-compatible schema for stored prediction records enriched with game details, actual scores, and evaluation status.

nodes.name: ImportStatus
nodes.summary: Schema for the import pipeline status response including last run timestamp, game counts, status code, error message, and optional rank diff report.
